title: My Favorite Meal Train Meals
excerpt: Every time I’ve been pregnant I’ve scheduled a postpartum meal train for my family, a way for loved ones to find a time to meet the new baby and drop off some food. Every time I’ve done this I’ve felt self-conscious; our family doesn’t need a free meal, after all, and even…

title: And Then There Were Three
excerpt: During my second pregnancy my husband and I were convinced that we were going to have another boy. We told the ultrasound technician as much when she asked us if we had any guesses about the sex, and when she (theatrically) announced, “You’re both wrong! It’s a girl!” …
